nightly_recharge._source: polar history export nightly_recovery records (62 nights, 2026-03-08..2026-05-20)
nightly_recharge._note: HRV/RHR/breathing derived from mean RR-interval + rMSSD in the export. Polar ANS Charge status (1-6), Nightly Recharge status, and the recovery score are NOT present in the export, so recovery_avg and ans_state_distribution are null (not synthesised). Wire recovery_avg from live recharge ans_charge_status when enough live nights accumulate.
